_meta.description: Generalized DeviantArt Stash DOM structure map. Account-agnostic — documents interaction chains, form elements, selectors, and navigation patterns that work for any DA user.
_meta.notes: DA uses hashed CSS class names that change on deploy. All selectors use ARIA roles, text content, and structural patterns only.

stash.description: Main stash page — all uploaded items (not yet published)

pagination.note: Pagination text like '1 - 50 of 527' appears in page body text

studioPublishedGalleries.description: Gallery and subscription tier management page

sections.name: Galleries
sections.notes: Premium galleries have a 'Premium' badge. 'Featured' is the default locked gallery.

submitDeviation.description: Full submit/edit page for a single deviation

sidebarNavigation.description: Left sidebar navigation links present on stash and studio pages

presetsButton.element: button (no href, no aria-expanded, no aria-haspopup)
presetsButton.behavior: Unknown — click produces no visible effect. May trigger a React state change not visible in DOM.

itemElements.title: img[alt] or first substantial button text

grid.toggleButton: button containing text 'Grid' (when in list) or 'List' (when in grid)

toolbar.location: Sticky div at top of content area
toolbar.note: Submit button text changes with selection count

detection.treeNavLinks: a[href*='/stash/2'] in sidebar/tree navigation (folder URLs start with /stash/2)
detection.createButton: Button or link with text 'Create New Folder'
detection.note: Folders have stash IDs starting with '2', items start with '0'

extraToolbarButtons: Create sub folder with all selected

perItemMoreMenu.moveFolderSubmenu: Shows parent folder ('Move Up') and sibling folders as destinations

headerSubmitMenu.description: Persistent tiny +Submit menu in the page header (2x2 px collapsed)

formElements.placeholder: How about some backstory? Add some pizzazz!

menuItems.name: Gallery

formElements.description: Multi-select combobox with checkboxes for each gallery

menuItems.note: Shows all user galleries with checkboxes. User's galleries are dynamic.

menuItems.name: Subscription tier

formElements.description: Combobox to assign items to a subscription tier

menuItems.note: Shows user's subscription tiers. Tiers are dynamic.

menuItems.name: Preset template
menuItems.note: Preset templates are user-created. First option is always 'Select'.

labelOptions.confirmationFlow: Click → confirmation toast/modal → toolbar returns to base state

menuItems.name: Move to folder
menuItems.note: Shows existing folders as move destinations

menuItems.name: Create folder with all selected
menuItems.description: Creates a new folder containing selected items

menuItems.name: Merge into Multi-Image Deviation
menuItems.description: Combines selected items into a single multi-image deviation

schedule.behavior: Only visible as standalone toolbar button when multiple items are selected. Otherwise available via More actions dropdown.

submit.behavior: Navigates to /_deviation_submit/ page with selected item(s)

perItemButtons.description: Buttons that appear when hovering over a stash item

directButtons.description: Clickable title — opens item detail page
Opens full edit dialog (same as per-item Edit)
Opens submit/edit dialog for single item
Navigates to item's stash detail page
Opens context menu with additional options

gridMode.note: Fewer buttons visible in grid overlay

items.name: Move to Folder
items.note: Inside folders, 'Move Up' moves item to parent. Sibling folders shown as destinations.

items.name: Sell / Edit Sale
items.description: Set or modify sale price. Shows 'Sell' if not on sale, 'Edit Sale' if already on sale.
items.editSaleDialog: Shows 'End this sale?' dialog with 'Never Mind' and 'End Sale' buttons

folderSpecificItems.name: Edit Folder
folderSpecificItems.description: Opens folder edit dialog with 'Update' confirmation

folderSpecificItems.name: Add to Shortcuts / Remove From Shortcuts

editDialog.description: Full submit/edit dialog opened via per-item Edit or + Add Tags buttons

formElements.placeholder: E.g.: rose, watercolor, painting, fanart, tutorial
Introduce your deviation. How about some backstory? Add some pizzazz!

formElements.label: Which tiers do you want to add this deviation to?
Submit to Premium Gallery
formElements.description: Premium gallery combobox (dynamic — user's premium galleries)

sections.name: Skip gallery and submit to Scraps

selectors.description: Reliable non-class selectors for key elements

toolbar.stickyContainer: div with position: sticky containing input[type='checkbox']
toolbar.selectAllCheckbox: First checkbox inside sticky toolbar div
toolbar.confirmButton: button with text matching /Update All|Delete All|Confirm/

urlPatterns.note: Item stash IDs start with '0', folder IDs start with '2'. Both use base36 alphanumeric hashes.

steps: 1. Select item(s) using checkbox(es)
2. Click dropdown trigger button (Edit, Label options, More actions)
3. Menu appears with [role='menu'] containing [role='menuitem'] elements
4. Click desired menuitem
5. Toolbar transforms to show form elements + Cancel + Save Changes
6. Fill form elements
7. Click 'Save Changes'
8. Confirmation modal appears (e.g. 'Update All')
9. Click confirmation button
10. Toolbar returns to base state
toolbarDropdownFlow.cancellation: Click 'Cancel' at step 5-6 to restore toolbar without saving
toolbarDropdownFlow.menuDismissal: Press Escape to close menu without selecting

steps: 1. Hover over item (in list or grid mode)
2. Action buttons appear (Edit, Copy Link, View, More)
3. Click desired button
4. Handle result (dialog, navigation, clipboard, or context menu)
1. Hover over item
2. Click 'More' button
3. Context menu appears with [role='menu']
4. Some items have submenus (Order, Move to Folder) — hover to expand
5. Click desired action
6. Handle result (dialog, navigation, action confirmation)
perItemMoreMenuFlow.submenuDetection: Submenu items are sibling DIV containers in the DOM, already rendered but visually hidden

steps: 1. Check total items via 'X - Y of Z' text pattern
2. Click Next page / Previous page / First page / Last page buttons
3. Wait for page content to load (checkboxes appear)
4. Items on new page are ready for interaction
1. Folders appear in sidebar tree navigation (links starting with /stash/2)
2. Click folder link to navigate inside
3. Folder has same toolbar + items structure as root stash
4. Additional buttons available: Create sub folder, Move to Folder (with parent folder option)
5. Navigate back via breadcrumb or stash root link

reactPortals.description: DA uses React portals — menus and dialogs render outside the toolbar DOM tree
reactPortals.tinyHeaderMenu: The +Submit header menu is a [role='menu'] with dimensions ≤10×10 px. Skip when looking for context menus.
reactPortals.menuIdentification: Use the last visible [role='menu'] with reasonable dimensions (>10px) and menu items count <20

userConfigCapture.description: User-specific configuration captured from the galleries/tiers page. Needed for dynamically populating dropdowns, validating tier assignments, etc.

cardStructure.description: Gallery card is an <a> tag containing child DIVs
children: DIV (optional 'Premium' badge — only present on premium galleries)

extractionStrategy.name: Find first <span> inside link whose text is NOT 'N deviations' and NOT 'Premium'
extractionStrategy.isPremium: Check link's direct children for a child whose textContent is exactly 'Premium'
extractionStrategy.isDefault: Gallery named 'Featured' is the default (cannot be deleted)

createButton.selector: button or a with text containing 'Create New Gallery'

cardStructure.description: Tier card is an <a> tag with same structure as gallery cards

createButton.selector: button or a with text containing 'Create New Tier'

stashPage.createNewFolderButton: Button with text 'Create New Folder' on stash root page
stashPage.createSubFolderInMoreActions: Menu item 'Create sub folder with all selected' in More actions dropdown (only inside folders)

studioTabs.note: Only read tabs inside [role='tablist'] containers — standalone [role='tab'] elements may be gallery cards

esbuildKeepNamesWorkaround.problem: tsx (esbuild) with keepNames:true wraps function expressions in __name() calls. Inside page.evaluate(), __name doesn't exist in browser context → ReferenceError.
esbuildKeepNamesWorkaround.safePattern: var fn = [function(x) { ... }][0]; // Array trick — esbuild can't name-wrap
esbuildKeepNamesWorkaround.scope: Only affects code inside page.evaluate() callbacks — Node.js context has __name defined

forOfLoopsInEvaluate.problem: for...of loops inside page.evaluate may trigger esbuild helpers not available in browser
forOfLoopsInEvaluate.safePattern: Use indexed for loops: for (var i = 0; i < arr.length; i++) { var item = arr[i]; }

reactHashedClasses.problem: DA uses hashed CSS class names (e.g., _3xK2a) that change on every deploy
reactHashedClasses.solution: Never use class selectors. Use ARIA roles, text content, structural selectors, and data attributes only.
